sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀναγεννάω

- Transliteration: Anagennao

- Phonetic: an-ag-en-nah'-o

- Definition:

1. to produce again, be born again, born anew

2. metaph. to have one's mind changed so that he lives a new life and one conformed to the will of God

- Origin: from G303 and G1080

- TDNT entry: 12:13,1

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G303 and G1080; to beget or (by extension) bear (again): - beget (bear) X again.
